REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS OFF CALENDAR. ON FEBRUARY 27, 2026 THE COURT ISSUED AT TENTATIVE RULING REQUESTING A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF ADDRESSING THE PROPRIETY OF SERVICE OF THE PETITION PURSUANT TO CCP 1011. NO SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF WAS FILED PROVIDING AUTHORITY OR ARGUMENT SUPPORTING THE PROPOSITION THAT SERVICE OF PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS APPROPRIATE PURSUANT TO CCP 1011(A) (SEE ORIGINAL PROOF OF SERVICE) OR CCP 1011(B) (SEE PROOF OF SERVICE ATTACHED TO MARCH 13, 2026 DECLARATION REGARDING SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND PETITION). PURSUANT TO EX. A TO THE DECLARATION REGARDING SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND PETITION THE SERVICE WAS PURPORTEDLY "MADE IN THE MANNER SPECIFICALLY PROVIDED IN PARTICULAR CASES." THERE IS NO ARGUMENT OR EVIDENCE REFERENCED ANYWHERE IN THE MARCH 13, 2026 SUPPLEMENTAL FILING AS TO "THE MANNER SPECIFICALLY PROVIDED" IN THIS CASE AND THAT THE SERVICE AS DESCRIBED IN EXS. 2A-2C TO THE DECLARATION REGARDING SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND PETITION SATISFIES THE SPECIFIC REQUIREMENT, WHATEVER IT MAY BE. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

AND GERRI STRAIN TRUST DATED NOVEMBER 19, 2002. AMENDED NOTICE OF PETITION AND PETITION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 25, 2026 FOR THE PETITIONER TO PROVIDE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF (NOT TO EXCEED TO PAGES) AND/OR DECLARATION (NOT TO EXCEED 2 PAGES EXCLUSIVE OF EXHIBITS) ADDRESSING THE PROPRIETY OF SERVICE OF THE PETITION PER CCP 1011 (SEE PROOFS OF SERVICE FILED ON JANUARY 16, 2026). THE COURT NOTES THAT A SUMMONS WAS REQUESTED AND ISSUED ON JANUARY 23, 2026. THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR THE SUMMONS ON FILE. IF PETITION AND SUMMONS HAVE BEEN SERVED IN ANY OTHER MANNER PETITIONER TO FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE REFLECTING SUCH SERVICE OR PROVIDE A COPY OF PREVIOUSLY FILED PROOF OF SERVICE. SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF/DECLARATION TO BE FILED AND SERVED NO LATER THAN MARCH 13, 2026. JUDGE: CHARLES HAINES, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters: Notice Of Second Amended Petition And Petition For Order To Compel Arbitration (Ccp  1281 Et Seq. )

Amended Notice Of Petition And Petition For Order To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Anna Baryudin; 415-421-0100; Fried, Williams & Grice Conner LLP; counsel for plaintiff appearing via Zoom.
No other appearances.

Ms. Baryudin contests the courts tentative ruling. Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Amended Petition to Compel Arbitration is OFF CALENDAR. On February 27, 2026 the Court issued at tentative ruling requesting a supplemental brief addressing the propriety of service of the Petition pursuant to CCP 1011. No supplemental brief was filed providing authority or argument supporting the proposition that service of Petition to Compel Arbitration is appropriate pursuant to CCP 1011(a) (See original Proof of Service) or CCP 1011(b) (See Proof of Service attached to March 13, 2026 Declaration Regarding Service of Summons and Petition). Pursuant to Ex. A to the Declaration Regarding Service of Summons and Petition the service was purportedly "made in the manner specifically provided in particular cases." There is no argument or evidence referenced anywhere in the March 13, 2026 supplemental filing as to "the manner specifically provided" in this case and that the service as described in Exs. 2A-2C to the Declaration Regarding Service of Summons and Petition satisfies the specific requirement, whatever it may be.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Not argued. No notice given. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER BRIGITTE STRAIN TRUSTEE OF THE EDWARD C. AND BRIGITTE STRAIN FAMILY TRUST U/T/D AUGUST 7, 2002; GERRI STRAIN, TRUSTEE OF THE GEORGE J. AND GERRI STRAIN TRUST DATED NOVEMBER 19, 2002. Amended Notice Of Petition And Petition For Order To Compel Arbitration is continued to March 25, 2026 for the Petitioner to provide a supplemental brief (not to exceed to pages) and/or declaration (not to exceed 2 pages exclusive of exhibits) addressing the propriety of service of the Petition per CCP 1011 (See Proofs of Service filed on January 16, 2026). The Court notes that a Summons was requested and issued on January 23, 2026. There is no proof of service for the summons on file. If Petition and Summons have been served in any other manner Petitioner to file a proof of service reflecting such service or provide a copy of previously filed proof of service. Supplemental brief/declaration to be filed and served no later than March 13, 2026. Judge: Charles Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
